news.paragraph: Intel has seen substantial recent growth, with reports indicating the stock has tripled in 2026 and was a top performer in April. Analysts are pointing toward massive AI opportunities and potential undervaluation as drivers for the stock. Traders should weigh this momentum against the seasonal 'sell in May' risk mentioned in recent market commentary.
headlines: Why Are Intel (INTC) Shares Soaring Today
